objects.name: Analytic 1648
objects.description: Defender correlates an app process performing a burst of OS/device attribute lookups (build, hardware, SDK level, system properties) with near-term execution branching (feature gating, module load, permission workflow changes) and/or immediate outbound communications, indicating environment evaluation used to shape follow-on actions.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Application accesses android.os.Build fields or device configuration APIs (MODEL, MANUFACTURER, VERSION.SDK_INT, HARDWARE)

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Correlation window for system-info collection burst → outbound transmission (e.g., 60–900s).
Minimum number of distinct system-attribute reads/queries within window to count as ‘broad fingerprinting’ (tune to telemetry fidelity).
How many distinct attribute categories (build fields, cpu, locale, patch level, network identifiers) must be observed.
If true, require the burst occurs while app is background to reduce noise from legitimate settings/about-device screens.
Legitimate device management, diagnostics, carrier services, and enterprise security apps expected to collect device inventory.
Window for ‘newly contacted domain’ enrichment after fingerprinting burst.
Approximate payload size range used for ‘fingerprint submit’ heuristic (environment dependent).
